Language change takes effect on next start.
Möchten Sie die Änderungen speichern?: Do you want to save the changes?
Open Cross Stitch (XML) — offener Austau: Open Cross Stitch (XML) — open exchange standard, readable by Pattern Maker, MacStitch/WinStitch, Stitch Fiddle
Komplettes Bundle (.pxs + HTML + PNG + P: Complete bundle (.pxs + HTML + PNG + PDF + thread list + original) as ZIP — ideal for sharing or backup
Lädt ein Beispiel-Muster (Herz mit Rahme: Loads a sample pattern (heart with frame, 3 layers, 6 colors) to try out the features
Autor, Copyright, Stickdatum und Notizen: Edit author, copyright, stitched date and notes (Ctrl+Alt+P)
Versionierte Snapshots des Musters anzei: View and restore versioned snapshots of the pattern (Ctrl+Alt+V)
Erfasst den Bildschirm und laesst dich e: Grabs the screen and lets you pick a color from anywhere (browser, photo viewer, other editor). The nearest thread equivalent is automatically added to the pattern palette.
Plugins durchsuchen und ausfuehren — eig: Browse and run plugins — Python scripts that manipulate the pattern (border, checkerboard, symmetry, ...).
Zwei Garne kombinieren (z.B. 1 Strang DM: Combine two threads (e.g., 1 strand DMC 310 + 1 strand DMC 745) for salt-and-pepper / tweed effects. Perceptual mix in CIE-Lab.
Eigenen Garn-Vorrat pflegen — Einkaufsli: Maintain your own thread inventory — shopping list in the statistics dialog (Ctrl+Shift+I)
Sticken-Modus an/aus — klick auf Zellen: Stitching mode on/off — clicking cells marks/clears progress (Ctrl+M)
Nur die aktuelle Farbe hervorheben — and: Highlight only the current color — others are strongly dimmed (Ctrl+H to undo)
Großes Muster auf mehrere Stickrahmen au: Split a large pattern across multiple hoops
Pattern-Heatmap anzeigen (Stichdichte/Fa: Show pattern heatmap (stitch density / color variety)
Übersicht der Features und Änderungen in: Overview of features and changes in the current version
Aktiver Stichtyp. Wechseln über das Stic: Active stitch type. Change via the stitch menu or Alt+1..7.
Create a canvas with default size.
Convert a photo / image into a pattern.
Beispiel zum Ausprobieren — Herz mit Rah: Sample to try — heart with frame.
Stichtyp fuer neue Stiche.\nVoll, halb (:
Stitch type for new stitches.
Full, half (/), half (\), or one of four quarter stitches.
Ziehen zum Verschieben, auf Ebene ziehen: Drag to move, drop on a layer to merge
Doppelklick = Hinzufügen | Ziehen zur Fa: Double click = add | drag to color bar
Heuristik aus Farbanzahl, Spezial-Stiche: Heuristic from color count, special stitches, backstitches and size.
Konzentrierter Modus zum Sticken: Klick:
Focused mode for stitching: click cell = check off.
Shortcut: Ctrl+M
Stiche dieser Farbe als gestickt markier: stitches of this color as stitched.
Vorschau für Wiederholungsmuster und Bor: Preview for repeating patterns and borders.
Click on canvas to place text.
Enter = confirm, Esc = cancel
Ziehe eine Linie zwischen zwei Punkten.\:
Drag a line between two points.
Colors are automatically interpolated.
Alle Einstellungen auf Standardwerte zur:
Reset all settings to defaults?

This cannot be undone.
Speichert das Muster automatisch in rege: Saves the pattern automatically at regular intervals
Wie oft eine versionierte Kopie des Must: How often a versioned copy of the pattern is stored in the snapshot history (File → Versions…).
Misst die Zeit, die du im Sticken-Modus: Measures the time you spend in stitching mode, saved per pattern. When leaving the mode, a hint shows the session and total time.
Maximale Anzahl der zuletzt geöffneten D: Maximum number of recently opened files
Stellt Größe und Position des Fensters b: Restores size and position of the window on startup
Farbschema der Anwendung (wird sofort an: Color scheme of the application (applied immediately)
Sprache der Benutzeroberflaeche. Aenderu: User interface language. Changes take effect on next start.
Fragt nach, bevor das Programm geschloss: Asks before the application is closed
Warnt, wenn eine Datei überschrieben wir: Warns when a file is overwritten
Wie lange Statusmeldungen angezeigt werd: How long status messages are displayed
Wird als Autor in HTML- und PDF-Exporten:
Shown as author in HTML and PDF exports
when the pattern itself has no author.
Erscheint als Footer in HTML/PDF-Exporte: Appears as footer in HTML/PDF exports.
Zeigt das Gitter auf dem Canvas: Shows the grid on the canvas
Geschwindigkeit des Zoomens mit Mausrad: Speed of zooming with mouse wheel
Stoff-Textur (Aida-Optik) auf leeren Zel: Fabric texture (Aida look) on empty cells
Zeigt eine dezente Stoff-Textur statt ei:
Shows a subtle fabric texture instead of a flat color.
Makes the pattern more realistic when stitching.
Verwendet beim nächsten Start das zuletz: Uses the last selected tool on next start
Farbtoleranz beim Füllen (0 = exakte Übe: Color tolerance when filling (0 = exact match)
Rückstiche rasten automatisch an Zellene: Backstitches snap automatically to cell corners
Wenn aktiv und ein Stift erkannt wird:\n:
When active and a pen is detected:
The brush size scales with the pen pressure.
Mouse input stays at 1 stitch per click (unchanged).
Maximale Brush-Groesse bei 100 % Stift-D:
Maximum brush size at 100 % pen pressure (radius).
1 = no brush (always single stitch), 5 = default, 10+ = very thick.
Aktiviert Pinch-Zoom auf Touchscreens (S:
Enables pinch zoom on touch screens (Surface, iPad with Apple Pencil, ...).
Off by default because Windows shows a toast hint on long drags on some devices when touch is accepted.
Change takes effect immediately.
Zeigt Katalognummern in der Farbauswahl: Shows catalog numbers in color selection
Weist neuen Farben automatisch Symbole z: Assigns symbols to new colors automatically
Wie Farben im Canvas angezeigt werden: How colors are shown on canvas
Hebt Stiche der ausgewählten Farbe hervo: Highlights stitches of the selected color
Größe der Farbfelder in der Farbleiste: Size of color fields in the color bar
Zellen pro Seite im PDF: Cells per page in the PDF
Bettet CSS direkt in die HTML-Datei ein: Embeds CSS directly into the HTML file
Working-Chart-Konvention: jede Seite zei:
Working-chart convention: each page additionally shows the first N stitches of the neighbor page (right/bottom). Makes it easier to align printed pages.

0 = off, 5-10 = standard for commercial patterns.
Zusaetzliche Spalten in der Legende mit:
Additional columns in the legend with the nearest thread
equivalents in other manufacturer palettes.
Matching via CIE-Lab Delta-E — no official 1:1 mapping.
Maximale Farbanzahl beim Bildimport: Maximum number of colors at image import
ℹ️ Hier können Sie Tastenkürzel anpassen: ℹ️ Here you can customize keyboard shortcuts. Double-click a shortcut to change it.
Für den Bildimport werden Pillow und num:
Image import requires Pillow and numpy.

Install with:
pip install Pillow numpy
Filtert isolierte Einzelpixel und kleine:
Filters out isolated single pixels and small clusters.
They are assigned to the dominant neighboring color, which
greatly simplifies the stitching chart.

1 = off, 2 = subtle (single pixels), 3-5 = aggressive.
Wird vor der Farbquantisierung angewende:
Applied before color quantization. Helps with images that are too dark,
pale, or oversaturated.
Erkennt Kanten im Bild per Sobel-Operato:
Detects edges in the image using the Sobel operator
and automatically generates backstitches along the outlines.
Zeigt eine Vorschau des Ergebnisses - ni: Shows a preview of the result - not required for import
Vorschau - Ziehe einen Ausschnitt (Doppe: Preview - Drag to select a crop (double-click = reset)
Pillow and numpy are not installed.

pip install Pillow numpy
Name: Name
Vergleich des Garnbedarfs für dieses Mus: Comparison of the thread requirements for this pattern with your stored stock. Manage the stock via Edit → Thread Stock… (Ctrl+Shift+I).
Das Muster enthält keine gestickte Farbe: The pattern contains no stitched color — no shopping list.
Vorgefertigte Diamond-Painting-Groessen,: Preset Diamond Painting sizes that fit the respective DIN format 1:1 (at 2.5mm drill pitch).
Noch keine eigenen Templates vorhanden.\:
No custom templates yet.

Create a project and save it
via File → Save as Template...
Geben Sie die gewünschte Größe ein oder: Enter the desired size or choose a category for preset templates.
So sieht deine Vorlage fertig geklebt au: This is how your finished template looks once glued. The drills have the typical glossy look with a lighter top side and a darker shadow. Use the mouse wheel to zoom and drag to move the view.
So sieht dein Muster gestickt aus. Wechs: This is how your pattern looks stitched. Switch the mode for different views, try different fabrics and fabric colors. Use the mouse wheel to zoom and drag to move the view.
Drill-Vorschau: facettierte Drills auf K:
Drill preview: faceted drills on adhesive base.
Pixel preview: flat color areas — like in the editor.
Stoff-Vorschau: realistisch mit Aida-Tex:
Fabric preview: realistic with Aida texture and cross-stitch pattern.
Pixel preview: flat color areas — like the pattern in the editor.
Symbol chart: black-and-white symbols — for printing.
Stoffart — höhere Zahl = feiner gewebt =: Fabric type — higher number = finer weave = smaller finished pattern
Rückstich-Linien in der Vorschau zeigen: Show backstitch lines in the preview
Zoom — auch per Mausrad im Vorschau-Bere: Zoom — also available via the mouse wheel in the preview area
Zoom so anpassen, dass das ganze Muster: Adjust the zoom so the whole pattern is visible
Realistische Vorschau mit Aida-Stoff-Tex: Realistic preview with Aida fabric texture and cross-stitch symbols — this is how it looks in the embroidery hoop.
Pixel-Vorschau mit flachen Farben — schn: Pixel preview with flat colors — fast and clear, like in the editor.
Schwarz-weißer Symbol-Plan — ideal zum D: Black-and-white symbol chart — ideal for printing and using on the go.
Drill-Vorschau: facettierte Quadrate mit: Drill preview: faceted squares with highlight and shadow — this is how the finished diamond painting template looks once glued.
Pixel-Vorschau: flache Farbflaechen — sc: Pixel preview: flat color areas — a quick check view without drill detail.
Diese Funktion schlägt Garne vor, die mi: This feature suggests threads that harmonize with the selected source color according to color theory. Choose the harmony type and click the cards you want to add to your palette.
Vorschläge — Karte anklicken zum Auswähl: Suggestions — click a card to select
Importiere Kreuzstich-Muster aus Pattern: Import cross-stitch patterns from Pattern Maker (.xsd), PCStitch (.pat) or Open Cross Stitch (.oxs) files.
💡 Tipp: Farben per Drag & Drop verschieb: 💡 Tip: Move colors via drag & drop
Wählen Sie zwei Farben aus und führen Si: Select two colors and merge them.
Beim Löschen werden alle Stiche mit dies:
Deleting will remove all stitches using these colors.
Continue?
Alle Änderungen verwerfen und zur ursprü: Discard all changes and return to the original order?
Alle Ebenen vereinen?\nDies kann nicht r:
Flatten all layers?
This cannot be undone.
Eine kompakte Übersicht der wichtigsten: A compact overview of the most important changes
Pro Ebene kannst du jetzt eine freie Not: You can now attach a free-form note to each layer (e.g. 'foreground shadows', 'backstitch lines'). Saved in the .pxs format.
Beim Sticken-Modus läuft ein Timer im Hi: A timer runs in the background during stitching mode. When you finish you see the session and total time. Toggle in Settings → General → 'Stitching & Snapshots'.
Versionierte Snapshots werden jetzt im k: Versioned snapshots are now created at a configurable interval (5–240 min). Default 30 min.
Eine Farbe isolieren — andere werden im: Isolate one color — the others are heavily dimmed on the canvas. Via right-click on a color swatch or Ctrl+H on the active color.
Pfeiltasten springen zur nächsten/vorher: The arrow keys jump to the next/previous unchecked cell of the active color. Enter/Space checks it off and jumps straight on.
Heuristik aus Farbanzahl, Größe, Sonders: Heuristic based on color count, size, specialty stitches and backstitches → Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced / Expert. Visible in the info panel and the statistics dialog.
Datei → 'Als Bundle (ZIP) exportieren…': File → 'Export as bundle (ZIP)…' packs .pxs, HTML, PNG, PDF (if reportlab is installed), thread list and original image into a ZIP — ideal for sharing.
Niedrigerer Wert = nur sehr ähnliche Far: Lower value = only very similar colors. Higher value = more pairs.
Die zweite Farbe jedes Paares wird durch: The second color of each pair is replaced by the first.
Stichdichte (Anzahl Stiche pro Block): Stitch density (number of stitches per block)
Links: niedrig — Rechts: hoch (maximaler: Left: low — Right: high (maximum value in the pattern)
Anzahl Stiche die zwei benachbarte Sekto: Number of stitches shared by two adjacent sectors — prevents visible seams. Recommended: 2-5.
Trage hier ein, wieviele Stränge du von: Enter how many strands of each color you still own. The statistics dialog automatically calculates a shopping list for the current pattern from this.
Eintraege mit 0 Straengen aus der Liste: Delete entries with 0 strands from the list.
Es gibt ungespeicherte Änderungen. Wirkl: There are unsaved changes. Really discard them?
Freie Notizen — werden auch im HTML/PDF-:
Free-form notes — also shown on the cover page in HTML/PDF export.
E.g. 'Gift for Mom's birthday', 'Huge challenge'.
Ersetzt alle Stiche einer Farbe durch ei: Replaces all stitches of one color with another color.
Keine Stiche mit dieser Farbe vorhanden: No stitches with this color present
Source and target color are identical.
Automatische Versionen werden alle 30 Mi: Automatic versions are created every 30 minutes whenever there are unsaved changes. Double-click shows details; the 'Restore' button loads this version back as the active pattern.
Select a version from the list.
Vergleicht den ausgewaehlten Snapshot vi: Visually compares the selected snapshot with the currently open pattern — highlights added, removed and changed stitches.
Noch keine Versionen vorhanden.\nSpeiche:
No versions yet.
Save or wait until the next auto-version is created.
Aktuelles Muster durch diese Version ers:
Replace the current pattern with this version?

Unsaved changes will be lost.
Tauscht alle Stiche zweier Farben gegens:
Swaps all stitches of two colors with each other.
Symbols and list order are preserved.
PDF-Export benoetigt die Bibliothek 'rep:
PDF export requires the 'reportlab' library.

Please install it with:
pip install reportlab

Alternatively, you can use the HTML export and
print as PDF from your browser.
Papierformat fuer den DP-Export (1:1-Mas: Paper format for the DP export (1:1 scale):
Papierformat fuer den PDF-Export:: Paper format for the PDF export:
Optionale Notizen fuer das PDF (leer las: Optional notes for the PDF (leave empty to skip):
Das Muster wurde als PDF exportiert.\n\n:
The pattern was exported as PDF.

Would you like to open the file?
Das Muster wurde als HTML exportiert.\n\:
The pattern was exported as HTML.

Would you like to open the file in your browser?
Bundle gespeichert.\n\nMoechten Sie den:
Bundle saved.

Would you like to open the folder?
Freie Notiz zur aktuell ausgewaehlten Eb: Free-form note for the currently selected layer — stored in the .pxs file on save.
Gesperrte Ebenen können nicht vereint we:
Locked layers cannot be merged.

Please unlock the affected layer(s) first.
At least one layer is required.
Kombiniere zwei Garne zu einem Tweed-Eff: Combine two threads into a tweed effect. Example: 1 strand of DMC 310 (black) + 1 strand of DMC 745 (cream) produces a warm salt-and-pepper tone. The blended color is computed perceptually (CIE-Lab).
Aktiv: Pattern wird wie ein Pixelbild bi:
On: pattern is scaled bilinearly like a pixel image,
stitches redistributed to the cell size. Ideal when scaling up.

Off: classic cropping/padding with empty cells at the edge.
Das Muster wird verkleinert. Stiche auße:
The pattern will be shrunk. Stitches outside the new area will be lost.

Continue?
Das Muster enthält keine Farben zum Expo: The pattern contains no colors to export.
Die Datei ist keine gültige PySticky-Pal: The file is not a valid PySticky palette file.
The palette file contains no colors.
Das Muster enthält keine Farben zum Konv: The pattern contains no colors to convert.
Das Muster enthält keine Stiche.\nFügen:
The pattern contains no stitches.
Add stitches first to optimize the path.
Schutz ist OPTIONAL — leere Felder = kei:
Protection is OPTIONAL — empty fields = no protection.
The watermark is drawn large and diagonally on every page.
Klicke irgendwo auf den Bildschirm, um e: Click anywhere on the screen to pick a color. Esc = cancel.
Das aktuelle Muster wurde geändert.\nMöc:
The current pattern has been modified.
Would you like to save the changes?
The printer could not be opened.
Demo-Muster geladen. Speichern unter… le: Demo pattern loaded. Save As… creates your own copy. Try the stitching mode (Ctrl+M) or Ctrl+H!
Jede Seite zeigt einen Bereich von 40&ti: Each page shows an area of 40×40 stitches with grid lines every 10.
Klicken Sie auf eine Seitennummer um dir: Click a page number to jump directly to the corresponding pattern page.
Perlen werden ueber dem Stoff angenaeht: Beads are sewn onto the fabric and are usually done at the end of the stitching work.
R&uuml;ckstiche werden nach den Kreuzsti: Backstitches are worked after the cross stitches and form outlines and details.
Rückstiche: {n} Linien werden über dem M: Backstitches: {n} lines are shown over the pattern.
<b>Stickpfad:</b> {stitches} Stiche |: Stitch path: {stitches} stitches | {colors} colors | {jumps} jumps | - - - = jump
<div class='backstitch-info'><strong>&#8: ↘ Backstitches: {n} lines are shown over the pattern.
<p><strong>&#8600; R&uuml;ckstiche:</str: ↘ Backstitches: {n} backstitches are shown as lines on the pattern pages.
Rendert volle Stiche als facettierte Dri: Renders full stitches as faceted drills and shows DMC numbers instead of symbols (Ctrl+D)
Aktueller Modus: Kreuzstich.\nKlicken, u:
Current mode: Cross Stitch.
Click to switch to Diamond Painting (automatically loads the DMC Diamond Painting palette).
Aktueller Modus: Diamond-Painting.\nKlic:
Current mode: Diamond Painting.
Click to switch to Cross Stitch.
Drill-Nummern in den Zellen ein-/ausblen: Show/hide drill numbers in the cells
<br><b>R&uuml;ckstiche:</b> {n} Linien (: Backstitches: {n} lines (shown as colored lines in the pattern)
Registriere hier deine aktuell laufenden: Register your currently active projects (.pxs files) here. Below you'll see a combined shopping list across all registered projects, compared against your stock.
